title: One man’s 10,000-strong fossil collection is now on public display
description: A remarkable private fossil collection is now on public display, after a family bequeathed more than 10,000 ancient fossils to the Waikato Museum.

title: Asteroid Bennu samples reveal signs of ancient water channels
description: A sample from Bennu reveals that water once flowed through hidden channels, preserving key compounds from the early days of the solar system.
